title: centella rubescens
intro: Centella rubescens, also known as Indian pennywort, is a perennial plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic and Chinese medicine, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centella rubescens include improved cognitive function, enhanced skin health, and potential neuroprotective effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal supplements and skincare products. Centella rubescens can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or topical cream, with the plant's extracts being used to create a range of herbal products for various health and wellness applications.
